H801.derivation: the same as H800 (אֶשָּׁה), but used in a liturgical sense;
H801.strongs_def: properly, a burnt-offering; but occasionally of any sacrifice

H802.derivation: feminine of H376 (אִישׁ) or H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ); irregular plural, נָשִׁים;(used in the same wide sense as H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ))
H802.kjv_def: (adulter) ess, each, every, female, [idiom] many, [phrase] none, one, [phrase] together, wife, woman. Often unexpressed in English.

H803.derivation: feminine passive participle from an unused root meaning to found;

H804.derivation: or אַשֻּׁר; apparently from H833 (אָשַׁר) (in the sense of successful);
H804.strongs_def: Ashshur, the second son of Shem; also his descendants and the country occupied by them (i.e. Assyria), its region and its empire
H804.kjv_def: Asshur, Assur, Assyria, Assyrians. See H838 (אָשֻׁר).
H804.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H805.derivation: or אַשּׁוּרִי; from a patrial word of the same form as H804 (אַשּׁוּר);
H805.strongs_def: an Ashurite (collectively) or inhabitant of Ashur, a district in Palestine

H808.derivation: from the same as H784 (אֵשׁ) (in the sense of pressing down firmly; compare H803 (אֲשׁוּיָה));

H809.strongs_def: something closely pressed together, i.e. a cake of raisins or other comfits

H810.derivation: from an unused root (probably meaning to bunch together);

H811.derivation: or אֶשְׁכֹּל; probably prolonged from H810 (אֶשֶׁךְ);
H811.strongs_def: a bunch of grapes or other fruit

H812.strongs_def: Eshcol, the name of an Amorite, also of a valley in Palestine

H813.strongs_def: Ashkenaz, a Japhethite, also his descendants

H815.derivation: from a root of uncertain signification;
H815.strongs_def: a tamarisk tree; by extension, a grove of any kind

H816.strongs_def: to be guilty; by implication to be punished or perish
H816.kjv_def: [idiom] certainly, be(-come, made) desolate, destroy, [idiom] greatly, be(-come, found, hold) guilty, offend (acknowledge offence), trespass.
H816.usage: guilty(14x), desolate(6x), offend(6x), trespass(4x), certainly(1x), destroy(1x), faulty(1x), greatly(1x), offence(1x)

H817.strongs_def: guilt; by implication, a fault; also a sin-offering

H819.strongs_def: guiltiness, a fault, the presentation of asin-offering

H821.derivation: or אַשׁמוּרָה; or אַשׁמֹרֶת; (feminine) from H8104 (שָׁמַר);

H822.derivation: apparently from an unused root (probably meaning to leave interstices);

H823.strongs_def: Ashnah, the name of two places in Palestine

H825.derivation: from an unused root (probably meaning to lisp, i.e. practice enchantment);

H827.derivation: perhaps (feminine) from the same as H825 (אַשָּׁף) (in the sense of covering);

H830.derivation: or אַשְׁפּוֹת; or שְׁפֹת; (contraction) plural of a noun of the same form as H827 (אַשְׁפָּה), from H8192 (שָׁפָה) (in the sense of scraping);
H830.strongs_def: a heap of rubbish or filth

H831.derivation: probably from H8254 (שָׁקַל) in the sense of weighing-place (i.e. mart);

H833.strongs_def: to be straight (used in the widest sense, especially to be level, right, happy); figuratively, to go forward, be honest, proper
H833.kjv_def: (call, be) bless(-ed, happy), go, guide, lead, relieve.
H833.usage: blessed(7x), lead(2x), go(2x), guide(1x), happy(2x), leaders(1x), relieve(1x)

H834.derivation: a primitive relative pronoun (of every gender and number);
H834.strongs_def: who, which, what, that; also (as an adverb and a conjunction) when, where, how, because, in order that, etc.
H834.kjv_def: [idiom] after, [idiom] alike, as (soon as), because, [idiom] every, for, [phrase] forasmuch, [phrase] from whence, [phrase] how(-soever), [idiom] if, (so) that ((thing) which, wherein), [idiom] though, [phrase] until, [phrase] whatsoever, when, where ([phrase] -as, -in, -of, -on, -soever, -with), which, whilst, [phrase] whither(-soever), who(-m, -soever, -se). As it is indeclinable, it is often accompanied by the personal pronoun expletively, used to show the connection.

H835.strongs_def: happiness; only in masculine plural construction as interjection, how happy!

H836.strongs_def: happy; Asher, a son of Jacob, and the tribe descended from him, with its territory; also a place in Palestine
H836.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H838.derivation: or אַשֻּׁר; from H833 (אָשַׁר) in the sense of going;

H839.strongs_def: the cedar tree or some other light elastic wood

H840.derivation: by orthographical variation from H833 (אָשַׁר) and H410 (אֵל); right of God;

H841.derivation: from the same as H840 (אֲשַׂרְאֵל); right toward God;

H842.strongs_def: Asherah (or Astarte) a Phoenician goddess; also an image of the same

H843.strongs_def: an Asherite (collectively) or descendant of Asher

H844.strongs_def: Asriel, the name of two Israelites

H845.strongs_def: an Asrielite (collectively) or descendant of Asriel

H846.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H833 (אָשַׁר);

H847.derivation: or אֶשְׁתָּאוֹל; probably from H7592 (שָׁאַל); intreaty;

H848.strongs_def: an Eshtaolite (collectively) or inhabitant of Eshtaol

H850.derivation: probably from the same as H7764 (שׁוּנִי); restful;

H851.derivation: or אֶשְׁתְּמוֹעַ; or אֶשְׁתְּמֹה; from H8085 (שָׁמַע) (in the sense of obedience);
H851.strongs_def: Eshtemoa or Eshtemoh, a place in Palestine
H851.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H853.derivation: apparent contracted from H226 (אוֹת) in the demonstrative sense of entity;
H853.strongs_def: properly, self (but generally used to point out more definitely the object of a verb or preposition, even or namely)

H854.strongs_def: properly, nearness (used only as a preposition or an adverb), near; hence, generally, with, by, at, among, etc.
H854.kjv_def: against, among, before, by, for, from, in(-to), (out) of, with. Often with another prepositional prefix.

H855.strongs_def: a hoe or other digging implement

H856.derivation: from H854 (אֵת) and H1168 (בַּעַל); with Baal;

H857.derivation: or אָתָא; a primitive root (collateral to H225 (אוּת) contraction);

H859.derivation: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel, corrected to אַתֵּנָה; or אַתֵּנָּה; a primitive pronoun of the second person;
H859.strongs_def: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you

H860.derivation: probably from the same as H386 (אֵיתָן) (in the sense of patience);

H861.derivation: (Aramaic) probably from the corresponding to H784 (אֵשׁ);

H862.derivation: or אַתִּיק; from H5423 (נָתַק) in the sense of decreasing;
H862.strongs_def: a ledge or offset in abuilding

H863.strongs_def: Ittai or Ithai, the name of a Gittite and of an Israelite

H864.strongs_def: Etham, a place in the Desert

H865.derivation: or אִתְמוֹל; or אֶתְמוּל; probably from H853 (אֵת) or H854 (אֵת) and H4136 (מוּל);
H865.kjv_def: [phrase] before (that) time, [phrase] heretofore, of late (old), [phrase] times past, yester(day).

H866.strongs_def: a present (as the price of harlotry)

H868.strongs_def: a gift (as the price of harlotry or idolatry)

H869.derivation: the same as H868 (אֶתְנַן) in the sense of H867 (אֶתְנִי);

H870.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to that of H871 (אֲתָרִים);

H871.derivation: plural from an unused root (probably meaning to step); places;

H874.strongs_def: to dig; by analogy, to engrave; figuratively, to explain

H876.strongs_def: Beer, a place in the Desert, also one in Palestine

H879.derivation: from H875 (בְּאֵר) and the plural of H410 (אֵל); well of heroes;
H879.strongs_def: Beer-Elim, a place in the Desert

H882.strongs_def: Beeri, the name of a Hittite and of an Israelite

H883.derivation: from H875 (בְּאֵר) and H2416 (חַי) (with prefix) and H7203 (רֹאֶה); well of a living (One) my Seer;
H883.strongs_def: Beer-Lachai-Roi, a place in the Desert

H884.derivation: from H875 (בְּאֵר) and H7651 (שֶׁבַע) (in the sense of H7650 (שָׁבַע)); well of an oath;

H885.derivation: from the feminine plural of H875 (בְּאֵר), and the plural contraction of H1121 (בֵּן), and H3292 (יַעֲקָן); wells of (the) sons of Jaakan;
H885.strongs_def: Beeroth-Bene-Jaakan, a place in the Desert
H885.kjv_def: Beeroth of the children of Jaakan.

H886.strongs_def: a Beerothite or inhabitant of Beeroth

H887.strongs_def: to smell bad; figuratively, to be offensive morally
H887.kjv_def: (make to) be abhorred (had in abomination, loathsome, odious), (cause a, make to) stink(-ing savour), [idiom] utterly.

H888.strongs_def: {to smell bad; figuratively, to be offensive morally}

H890.strongs_def: stink-weed or any other noxious or useless plant

H892.derivation: feminine active participle of an unused root meaning to hollow out;
H892.strongs_def: something hollowed (as a gate), i.e. pupil of the eye

H894.strongs_def: Babel (i.e. Babylon), including Babylonia and the Babylonian empire

H895.strongs_def: {Babel (i.e. Babylon), including Babylonia and the Babylonian empire}

H898.strongs_def: to cover (with a garment); figuratively, to act covertly; by implication, to pillage
H898.kjv_def: deal deceitfully (treacherously, unfaithfully), offend, transgress(-or), (depart), treacherous (dealer, -ly, man), unfaithful(-ly, man), [idiom] very.
H898.usage: treacherously(23x), transgressor(10x), transgress(3x), deceitfully(2x), treacherous(2x), offend(1x), unfaithfully(1x)

H899.strongs_def: a covering, i.e. clothing; also treachery or pillage
H899.kjv_def: apparel, cloth(-es, ing), garment, lap, rag, raiment, robe, [idiom] very (treacherously), vesture, wardrobe.
H899.usage: garment(107x), clothes(69x), cloth(13x), raiment(12x), apparel(4x), robe(4x), wardrobe(2x), very(2x), clothing(1x), lap(1x), rags(1x), vestures(1x)
